Citizen Detective.description: Skeptical, but can see signs others miss. Their self-appointed authority may make their arguments more persuasive to some...and less so to others.

observations.inter_level_thought: These people are lucky a "professional" is on the case.

EMT.description: Trained on medical equipment and saving lives. Gets a bonus to medical supplies and certain QTEs (more health, less input needed).

observations.inter_level_thought: My job is literally keeping people alive in situations like this. I need to stay calm and do what I was trained to do.

Journalist.description: Has this kind of thing happened before? There's a story here, and they know how to find it. (Can find clues in the environment that others miss).

observations.inter_level_thought: I can't shake the feeling that something terrible is about to happen. ..and may have before. I need to stay alert.

Medium.description: Not quite a visionary, but they see the most warnings and omens (at a cost of fear and paranoia). Think Clear Rivers near the end of FD1 or all of FD2.

observations.inter_level_thought: They don't see the signs like I do. The way the air shifts, the little hints that something's wrong.. I just hope I can stay one step ahead of it.

Mechanic.description:
Can use tools in ways others can't.
(Bonus to mechanical/electrical hazards, tools & fixes).

observations.inter_level_thought: There isn't any such thing as a 'freak accident' in my line of work. Every failure has a cause, and I intend to find it.

Athlete.description:
Physically gifted, you 'just win', but can you outrun Fate?
(More base health  ..wtf is a Bruin anyway?)

observations.inter_level_thought: Baby I just win, that's all I know how to do.
